entries.name: natSorted

entries.name: natSortKey

entries.name: searchsorted

entries.name: argsortScalars

entries.name: Series
entries.reason: High-level JS class whose methods accept arbitrary JS callbacks, return new Series instances, and interoperate with JS accessors, Index objects, and the extension registry. Porting at the class level would require replacing the entire TS implementation.

methods.name: add
methods.reason: Performs element-wise numeric addition with optional index alignment when the operand is a Series, requiring JS label-based alignment, dtype promotion, and NA propagation through JavaScript missing-value identity semantics.

methods.name: at
methods.reason: Label-based element access; traverses the TypeScript Index using JS equality semantics to locate the label, then returns the stored JS value.

methods.name: cat
methods.reason: Accessor property returning a CategoricalAccessor JS object that maintains a live reference to the parent Series instance.

methods.name: copy
methods.reason: Returns a deep copy of the Series by constructing a new TypeScript Series instance with cloned data array and Index; no numeric computation.

methods.name: corr
methods.reason: Computes Pearson correlation requiring index alignment between two Series objects, JS label-based pairing for matched values, and NA-aware accumulation over aligned pairs.

methods.name: count
methods.reason: Counts non-null values by filtering through JavaScript null/undefined/NaN identity checks; result is a scalar with no heavy numeric computation.

methods.name: div
methods.reason: Performs element-wise true division with optional index alignment when the operand is a Series, requiring JS label-based alignment, dtype promotion, and NA propagation through JavaScript missing-value identity semantics.

methods.name: dropna
methods.reason: Removes null/undefined/NaN entries and returns a new Series with a filtered TypeScript Index preserving original labels.

methods.name: dt
methods.reason: Accessor property returning a DatetimeAccessor JS object that maintains a live reference to the parent Series instance.

methods.name: empty
methods.reason: Property getter returning scalar metadata (size, shape, ndim, empty, flags, or similar) from the TypeScript instance; no array computation is involved.

methods.name: eq
methods.reason: Element-wise equality comparison returning Series<boolean>; requires JS label-based index alignment and NA-aware comparison that returns null for missing pairs.

methods.name: ewm
methods.reason: Factory method that constructs a TypeScript EWM (exponentially-weighted moving) object; EWM requires per-element recursive alpha weighting tied to JS runtime state.

methods.name: expanding
methods.reason: Factory method that constructs and returns a TypeScript Expanding window object; no computation is performed until an aggregation method is called.

methods.name: fillna
methods.reason: Replaces missing values (null/undefined/NaN) per JS identity semantics; returns a new Series with TypeScript Index and same labels.

methods.name: filter
methods.reason: Filters rows by a boolean Series or boolean array; returns a new Series with a filtered TypeScript Index preserving original labels.

methods.name: flags
methods.reason: Property getter that constructs and returns a TypeScript Flags object wrapping the Series metadata; no array computation.

methods.name: floordiv
methods.reason: Performs element-wise floor division with JS label-based index alignment when the operand is a Series; dtype promotion and NA propagation require JavaScript runtime semantics.

methods.name: ge
methods.reason: Element-wise greater-than-or-equal comparison returning Series<boolean>; requires JS label-based index alignment and NA-aware comparison with null propagation.

methods.name: groupby
methods.reason: Factory method constructing a TypeScript SeriesGroupBy object using a JavaScript Map for group key aggregation; group semantics require JS label identity.

methods.name: gt
methods.reason: Element-wise greater-than comparison returning Series<boolean>; requires JS label-based index alignment and NA-aware comparison with null propagation.

methods.name: iat
methods.reason: Integer-position element access; returns the raw JS stored value at index i without any numeric computation.

methods.name: iloc
methods.reason: Integer-position selection returning a scalar or new Series with TypeScript Index slice and JS array slicing semantics.

methods.name: isin
methods.reason: Checks membership using a JavaScript Set or array with JS triple-equals equality semantics for mixed-type scalar values.

methods.name: isna
methods.reason: Checks each element for null/undefined/NaN using JavaScript identity operators; returns a new Series<boolean> with TypeScript Index construction.

methods.name: le
methods.reason: Element-wise less-than-or-equal comparison returning Series<boolean>; requires JS label-based index alignment and NA-aware comparison with null propagation.

methods.name: length
methods.reason: Property getter returning scalar metadata (size, shape, ndim, empty, flags, or similar) from the TypeScript instance; no array computation is involved.

methods.name: loc
methods.reason: Label-based selection returning a scalar or new Series with TypeScript Index construction and JS label matching semantics.

methods.name: lt
methods.reason: Element-wise less-than comparison returning Series<boolean>; requires JS label-based index alignment and NA-aware comparison that returns null for missing pairs.

methods.name: map

methods.name: mod
methods.reason: Performs element-wise modulo with JS label-based index alignment when the operand is a Series; dtype promotion and NA propagation require JavaScript runtime semantics.

methods.name: mul
methods.reason: Performs element-wise multiplication with optional index alignment when the operand is a Series, requiring JS label-based alignment, dtype promotion, and NA propagation through JavaScript missing-value identity semantics.

methods.name: ndim

methods.name: ne

methods.name: notna

methods.name: nunique

methods.name: pow

entries.name: DataFrame
entries.reason: High-level JS class with per-column label dispatch, method-chaining accessors, rolling/expanding/ewm subclasses, and deep interoperation with Series and TypeScript Index objects. Porting the class itself to WASM would require replacing the entire TypeScript implementation.

methods.name: corr

methods.name: count

methods.name: cov

methods.name: describe
